title: Pretty much vanilla+
description: This is a Vanilla+ mod pack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience while maintaining the classic feel of the game. It adds a variety of new structures, improved biomes, and enhanced villagers, along with a range of quality-of-life mods.
body: This is a Vanilla+ mod pack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience while maintaining the classic feel of the game. It adds a variety of new structures, improved biomes, and enhanced villagers, along with a range of quality-of-life mods. These additions provide more to explore and interact with, all while staying true to the original Vanilla experience.
